---
title: ""
page-layout: full
toc: false
anchor-sections: false
listing:
  id: projects-listing
  contents: projects
  type: grid
  grid-columns: 2
  sort: "date desc"
  fields: [image, categories, title, description, status]
  image-height: 220px
  filter-ui: false
  categories: false
---

::: {.listing-header}
::: {}
[03 — Projects]{.label}

::: {.h1}
The human cost of global value chains
:::
:::
::: {.filter-bar data-filter-group="true" data-filter-target="#listing-projects-listing"}
<button type="button" class="filter-btn is-active" data-filter="All">All</button>
<button type="button" class="filter-btn" data-filter="Supply Chains">Supply Chains</button>
<button type="button" class="filter-btn" data-filter="Climate Modelling">Climate Modelling</button>
<button type="button" class="filter-btn" data-filter="Field Research">Field Research</button>
:::
:::

::: {#projects-listing}
:::
